mechanics.title: Paint & Territory
mechanics.shortDesc: Fast block-claiming system and territory logic.
mechanics.longDesc:
The core of ColorClash-Paint technology, designed for extreme performance:
- **Deterministic Overwrite:** Instant claiming of neutral and enemy blocks.
- **Visual Dimming:** Fresh paint is brightest, fading slightly over time (no gameplay impact).
- **Performance:** O(1) optimization for movement checks and chunk caching.
- **Territory Ticks:** Periodic ownership reporting (countOwnedBlocks) to the scoring system.

mechanics.title: Scoring & Combo
mechanics.shortDesc: We reward rhythm, movement, and aggressive map control.
mechanics.longDesc:
The Combo Multiplier system enforces dynamic gameplay:
- **Buildup:** Continuous painting and eliminations build the Combo level.
- **Multiplier:** The final score of each action is multiplied by the current Flow coefficient.
- **Reset:** Death instantly resets the Combo counter.
- **Sync:** Server is authoritative, UI reads snapshots to avoid update spam.

mechanics.title: Chromatic Energy
mechanics.shortDesc: Unstable energy bursts that change the rules of the game.
mechanics.longDesc:
Power-ups are 'unstable bursts' designed to create unique situations:
- **Spawn System:** Map-defined anchors with randomized refresh timers.
- **Arsenal:** From 'Neon Turbo' (area flood) to 'Trap Tiles' (chromatic camouflage).
- **Clean Up:** Guaranteed removal of effects after duration expires.
- **Chaos Mode:** Special modifier increasing spawn frequency.

gameModes.title: Free-for-All
gameModes.shortDesc: Pure competition. Just you and your map.
gameModes.longDesc: A mode where every piece of territory belongs only to you. No allies means every other color stain on the map is your target. Maximum energy management intensity.

gameModes.title: Team Battle
gameModes.shortDesc: Strategic coordination and merging color zones.
gameModes.longDesc: Cooperation is key. The system aggregates player contributions (Team Score), and joint painting allows faster Combo building for the entire team. Strategic blocking of passages with team color.

gameModes.title: Chaos Mode
gameModes.shortDesc: Rules cease to exist. Dynamic events.
gameModes.longDesc: A modifier applied to base modes. Increased power-up frequency, faster Combo tempo, and additional 'Global Events' that can suddenly change gravity or invert colors on the map.

regions.subtitle: Region 01 // Megacity
regions.title: Neon City
regions.shortDesc: Vertical jungle perfect for attacks from above.
regions.longDesc: A map characterized by a large amount of vertical surfaces (skyscraper walls). Optimal for players using 'Sticky Shoes' and fast vertical rotations.

regions.subtitle: Region 02 // Core
regions.title: Volcanic Island
regions.longDesc: An island with an active volcano that periodically destroys painted blocks in the central zone. Requires constant re-coloring and monitoring of 'Territory Ticks'.

regions.subtitle: Region 03 // Void
regions.title: Frozen Realm
regions.longDesc: A region with unique movement physics. Painting ice blocks increases your team's grip, while enemies slide on your color.

regions.subtitle: Region 04 // Experim.
regions.title: Rainbow Maze
regions.shortDesc: A maze with shifting wall layouts.
regions.longDesc: An experimental map where 'Special Block Bonuses' are hidden inside moving walls. Requires excellent spatial memory and fast claiming of new corridors.
